title: Dichanthelium petropolitanum
taxonomy: Dichanthelium petropolitanum is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is further classified as a member of the genus Dichanthelium, which is a group of grasses that are commonly found in North America. Dichanthelium petropolitanum is a type of grass that is native to the United States, specifically in the Midwestern and Eastern regions. The species is typically found growing in a variety of habitats, including prairies, meadows, and woodland edges. Within the classification, Dichanthelium petropolitanum is often grouped with other grasses that share similar characteristics and growth habits.
